description: Benchmark tests for agent-router skill - Intelligent task-to-Agent router

baseline_comparison.description: Human manually reads task description and picks an agent

evals.name: backend-task-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task to the correct agent: 'Implement a new REST API endpoint POST /api/v1/orders that validates request body, writes to PostgreSQL, and returns 201 on success.'

assertions.name: selects_backend_architect
assertions.description: Should select backend-architect agent for API/database task

assertions.name: confidence_above_threshold
assertions.description: Confidence score should be >= 0.85 for clear backend task

assertions.name: provides_routing_rationale
assertions.description: Should explain why backend-architect was selected

assertions.name: no_ambiguous_multi_match
assertions.description: Should not suggest multiple agents for a clearly backend task

evals.name: frontend-task-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task: 'Build a Flutter product listing screen with infinite scroll, skeleton loading states, and pull-to-refresh using Riverpod for state management.'

assertions.name: selects_mobile_developer
assertions.description: Should select mobile-developer agent for Flutter UI task

assertions.name: high_confidence_flutter
assertions.description: Flutter/Riverpod keywords should yield high confidence >= 0.90

assertions.name: mentions_flutter_rationale
assertions.description: Routing rationale should reference Flutter or mobile

evals.name: ambiguous-task-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task: 'Update the user profile feature to sync data between the mobile app and backend API.'

assertions.name: flags_ambiguity
assertions.description: Should flag that task spans multiple domains

assertions.name: suggests_decomposition
assertions.description: Should suggest breaking task into sub-tasks or escalating

evals.name: multi-agent-suggestion
evals.prompt: Route this task: 'Design and implement a real-time notification system: push notifications on mobile (Flutter) and a WebSocket server on the backend (FastAPI), plus update the shared API contract.'

assertions.name: suggests_mobile_developer
assertions.description: Should suggest mobile-developer for Flutter push notification work

assertions.name: suggests_backend_architect
assertions.description: Should suggest backend-architect for WebSocket/FastAPI work

assertions.name: identifies_parallel_work
assertions.description: Should identify that work can proceed in parallel

assertions.name: provides_task_split
assertions.description: Should provide a task breakdown per agent

evals.name: fallback-routing
evals.prompt: Route this task: 'Review the overall project architecture, assess technical debt across all modules, and create a refactoring roadmap.'

assertions.name: falls_back_to_tech_lead
assertions.description: Should fallback to tech-lead for cross-cutting architectural concerns

assertions.name: explains_fallback_reason
assertions.description: Should explain why tech-lead is the fallback choice

assertions.name: does_not_hallucinate_agent
assertions.description: Should not invent agent names not in the registry
